company.name: MMBS Groep
company.description: MMBS Groep is a professional construction and renovation company based in the Netherlands.

services.name: Renovation
services.description: Complete interior and exterior renovation for homes and offices.

services.name: Construction
services.description: New construction projects for residential and commercial clients.

services.name: Painting
services.description: Professional painting services for walls, ceilings, and facades.

services.name: Flooring
services.description: Installation of all types of flooring including parquet, tiles, and vinyl.

services.name: Plastering
services.description: Stucco and plastering work for smooth, high-quality wall finishes.

faq.question: How can I request a quote?
faq.answer: You can request a free quote by calling +31 30 686 5447 or emailing info@mmbs.nl.

faq.question: Do you work on weekends?
faq.answer: We work Monday to Friday from 08:00 to 17:00. For urgent matters, please contact us by email.

faq.question: What areas do you serve?
faq.answer: We operate throughout the Netherlands, with main offices in Utrecht, Amsterdam, and Rotterdam.
